title: Youtube poop: Mario's GOOD Christmas Gift Part 1
description:
I am very sorry about this ones quality Im still learning how adobe premiere pro 2.0 works if anyone know how to make a video larger without haveing zoom I will be very happy but yeah this was a test but it ended up turning into a really good poop except for the qulity part T_T im still trying to learn how to pitch shift and do the swirl in the middle effects.
plot: everyone in Dome city wants to make a youtube poop (yoshi and oogtar) but its such a bad program everyone is mad at it (just say that stake is WMM) mario has a plan, since the cavepeople are so stupid mario tells everyone its christmas and tries to give all the people in Dome city adobe premiere to stop all the squabbleing can he do it? watch and find out. . .
honors:
#65 - Top Rated (Today) - Comedy
#57 - Most Discussed (Today) - Comedy
#63 - Top Favorites (Today) - Comedy      (I had more but I missed them due to my horrible computer) i just notice the video looks better if you watch it on your nintendo wii
